'''''Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide''' was a strategy guide published by [[Prima Games]] for ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. The book includes the short story "[[Pax Empirica—The Wookiee Annihilation]]."

{{Book-stub}}
